hypothesis: Enhancing steric and electrostatic complementarity at positions 5 and 11 will improve SSTR2 selectivity by forming specific interactions with ECL2/TM5 residues unique to SSTR2, while reducing off-target affinity.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are failing due to poor structural quality and lack of docking confidence. Increasing candidate diversity and tightening clash filters will help generate better candidates while maintaining selectivity focus.

proposed_changes.rationale: Increase the number of candidates to improve the chances of generating structurally valid and selective designs.
Tighter clash filtering will reduce structural failures by eliminating candidates with poor geometry.
